     1→/**
     2→ * ui-core.js
     3→ * Core UI routing, tab management, modal management, and page initialization.
     4→ * Entry point for the application - loads on DOMContentLoaded.
     5→ */
     6→
     7→// StorageKeys is defined in api-client.js (loaded before this file)
     8→
     9→/**
    10→ * Custom confirm dialog — returns a Promise<boolean>.
    11→ * Replaces browser confirm() which can be silently suppressed once the user
    12→ * checks "Prevent this page from creating additional dialogs".
    13→ *
    14→ * Usage:  if (await confirmDialog('Are you sure?')) { ... }
    15→ */
    16→function confirmDialog(message, { confirmLabel = 'OK', cancelLabel = 'Cancel', danger = false } = {}) {
    17→  return new Promise(resolve => {
    18→    // Reuse or create the shared overlay element
    19→    let overlay = document.getElementById('confirm-dialog-overlay');
    20→    if (!overlay) {
    21→      overlay = document.createElement('div');
    22→      overlay.id = 'confirm-dialog-overlay';
    23→      overlay.style.cssText =
    24→        'display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45); z-index:9999;' +
    25→        'align-items:center; justify-content:center;';
    26→      overlay.innerHTML =
    27→        '<div id="confirm-dialog-box" style="background:#fff; border-radius:8px; padding:24px 28px;' +
    28→        'max-width:400px; width:90%; box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); font-family:inherit;">' +
    29→        '<p id="confirm-dialog-msg" style="margin:0 0 20px; font-size:0.95em; color:#1e293b; white-space:pre-wrap;"></p>' +
    30→        '<div style="display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end;">' +
    31→        '<button id="confirm-dialog-cancel" style="padding:6px 16px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;' +
    32→        'border-radius:5px; background:#f8fafc; cursor:pointer; color:#475569;"></button>' +
    33→        '<button id="confirm-dialog-ok" style="padding:6px 16px; border:none;' +
    34→        'border-radius:5px; cursor:pointer; color:#fff; font-weight:600;"></button>' +
    35→        '</div></div>';
    36→      document.body.appendChild(overlay);
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    const okBtn     = document.getElementById('confirm-dialog-ok');
    40→    const cancelBtn = document.getElementById('confirm-dialog-cancel');
    41→    const msgEl     = document.getElementById('confirm-dialog-msg');
    42→
    43→    msgEl.textContent          = message;
    44→    okBtn.textContent          = confirmLabel;
    45→    cancelBtn.textContent      = cancelLabel;
    46→    okBtn.style.background     = danger ? '#dc2626' : '#3b82f6';
    47→
    48→    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
    49→
    50→    const finish = (result) => {
    51→      overlay.style.display = 'none';
    52→      // Remove listeners to avoid stacking handlers
    53→      okBtn.replaceWith(okBtn.cloneNode(true));
    54→      cancelBtn.replaceWith(cancelBtn.cloneNode(true));
    55→      resolve(result);
    56→    };
    57→
    58→    // Rebind cloned buttons
    59→    document.getElementById('confirm-dialog-ok').addEventListener('click',     () => finish(true),  { once: true });
    60→    document.getElementById('confirm-dialog-cancel').addEventListener('click', () => finish(false), { once: true });
    61→    overlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === overlay) finish(false); }, { once: true });
    62→  });
    63→}
    64→
    65→/**
    66→ * Global fetch interceptor — shows amber banner on 409 Conflict (session already active).
    67→ */
    68→(function() {
    69→  const _origFetch = window.fetch;
    70→  window.fetch = async function(...args) {
    71→    const resp = await _origFetch.apply(this, args);
    72→    if (resp.status === 409) {
    73→      showSessionConflictBanner();
    74→    }
    75→    return resp;
    76→  };
    77→})();
    78→
    79→/**
    80→ * Initialize the application on DOM ready.
    81→ * Sets up event listeners, restores session, and loads initial tab.
    82→ */
    83→async function initialize() {
    84→  try {
    85→    // Initialize state
    86→    if (typeof initializeState === 'function') {
    87→      initializeState();
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    // Try to restore prior session
    91→    if (typeof restoreSession === 'function') {
    92→      await restoreSession();
    93→    }
    94→
    95→    // Set up event listeners
    96→    setupEventListeners();
    97→
    98→    // Restore tab data from localStorage
    99→    if (typeof loadStateFromLocalStorage === 'function') {
   100→      loadStateFromLocalStorage();
   101→    }
   102→
   103→    // Load initial tab content
   104→    const savedTab = localStorage.getItem(StorageKeys.CURRENT_TAB) || 'job';
   105→    switchTab(savedTab);
   106→
   107→    console.log('✅ Application initialized');
   108→  } catch (error) {
   109→    console.error('Initialization error:', error);
   110→    appendMessage('system', `⚠️ Failed to initialize: ${error.message}`);
   111→  }
   112→}
   113→
   114→/**
   115→ * Set up all global event listeners.
   116→ */
   117→function setupEventListeners() {
   118→  // Tab buttons
   119→  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(tab => {
   120→    tab.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   121→      const tabName = e.target.id.replace('tab-', '');
   122→      switchTab(tabName);
   123→    });
   124→  });
   125→
   126→  // Message input (Enter key to send)
   127→  const messageInput = document.getElementById('message-input');
   128→  if (messageInput) {
   129→    messageInput.addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
   130→      if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
   131→        e.preventDefault();
   132→        if (typeof sendMessage === 'function') {
   133→          sendMessage();
   134→        }
   135→      }
   136→    });
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  // Chat toggle button
   140→  const toggleBtn = document.querySelector('.toggle-chat');
   141→  if (toggleBtn) {
   142→    toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleChat);
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  // Modal close on ESC key
   146→  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
   147→    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   148→      closeAllModals();
   149→    }
   150→  });
   151→
   152→  // Close modals on background click
   153→  document.querySelectorAll('[role="dialog"]').forEach(modal => {
   154→    modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   155→      if (e.target === modal) {
   156→        closeModal(modal.id);
   157→      }
   158→    });
   159→  });
   160→}
   161→
   162→/**
   163→ * Switch to a specific tab and load its content.
   164→ * @param {string} tab - Tab name (job, analysis, customizations, cv, download)
   165→ */
   166→function switchTab(tab) {
   167→  // Update active tab button
   168→  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
   169→  const tabBtn = document.getElementById(`tab-${tab}`);
   170→  if (tabBtn) {
   171→    tabBtn.classList.add('active');
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  // Update current tab state via stateManager
   175→  try {
   176→    if (typeof stateManager !== 'undefined' && stateManager.setCurrentTab) {
   177→      stateManager.setCurrentTab(tab);
   178→    } else {
   179→      // Fallback: direct localStorage if stateManager not available
   180→      localStorage.setItem(StorageKeys.CURRENT_TAB, tab);
   181→    }
   182→  } catch (e) {
   183→    console.warn('Could not save current tab to localStorage');
   184→  }
   185→
   186→  // Adjust layout for CV tab (paper-sized) vs. others (full-width)
   187→  const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
   188→  if (content) {
   189→    content.classList.toggle('full-width', tab !== 'cv');
   190→  }
   191→
   192→  // Load content for the tab
   193→  loadTabContent(tab);
   194→}
   195→
   196→/**
   197→ * Load content for a specific tab.
   198→ * Routes to appropriate rendering function based on tab.
   199→ * @param {string} tab - Tab name
   200→ */
   201→async function loadTabContent(tab) {
   202→  const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
   203→  if (!content) return;
   204→
   205→  content.innerHTML = ''; // Clear previous content
   206→
   207→  try {
   208→    switch (tab) {
   209→      case 'job':
   210→        if (typeof populateJobTab === 'function') {
   211→          await populateJobTab();
   212→        }
   213→        break;
   214→
   215→      case 'analysis':
   216→        if (typeof populateAnalysisTab === 'function' && tabData.analysis) {
   217→          populateAnalysisTab(tabData.analysis);
   218→        } else {
   219→          content.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; color: #666;">No analysis data yet. Submit a job description to begin.</p>';
   220→        }
   221→        break;
   222→
   223→      case 'customizations':
   224→        if (typeof populateCustomizationsTab === 'function' && tabData.customizations) {
   225→          populateCustomizationsTab(tabData.customizations);
   226→        } else {
   227→          content.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; color: #666;">Run analysis first to see customization recommendations.</p>';
   228→        }
   229→        break;
   230→
   231→      case 'cv':
   232→        if (typeof populateCVTab === 'function' && tabData.cv) {
   233→          populateCVTab(tabData.cv);
   234→        } else {
   235→          content.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; color: #666;">Generate a CV to see preview.</p>';
   236→        }
   237→        break;
   238→
   239→      case 'download':
   240→        if (typeof populateDownloadTab === 'function' && tabData.cv) {
   241→          await populateDownloadTab(tabData.cv);
   242→        } else {
   243→          content.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; color: #666;">Generate a CV first to download.</p>';
   244→        }
   245→        break;
   246→
   247→      default:
   248→        content.innerHTML = '<p style="padding: 20px; color: #999;">Unknown tab.</p>';
   249→    }
   250→  } catch (error) {
   251→    console.error(`Error loading tab ${tab}:`, error);
   252→    content.innerHTML = `<p style="padding: 20px; color: #c41e3a;">Error loading content: ${error.message}</p>`;
   253→  }
   254→}
   255→
   256→/**
   257→ * Toggle collapsible chat panel (interaction area).
   258→ */
   259→function toggleChat() {
   260→  const interactionArea = document.querySelector('.interaction-area');
   261→  const viewerArea = document.querySelector('.viewer-area');
   262→
   263→  if (interactionArea) {
   264→    const isCollapsed = interactionArea.classList.toggle('collapsed');
   265→    if (viewerArea) {
   266→      viewerArea.style.flex = isCollapsed ? '1 1 100%' : '0 1 60%';
   267→    }
   268→    try {
   269→      localStorage.setItem(StorageKeys.CHAT_COLLAPSED, isCollapsed);
   270→    } catch (e) {
   271→      console.warn('Could not save chat state');
   272→    }
   273→  }
   274→}
   275→
   276→/**
   277→ * Open a modal by ID.
   278→ * @param {string} modalId - ID of modal element
   279→ */
   280→function openModal(modalId) {
   281→  const modal = document.getElementById(modalId);
   282→  if (modal) {
   283→    modal.classList.add('visible');
   284→    modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
   285→    // Lock body scroll
   286→    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
   287→  }
   288→}
   289→
   290→/**
   291→ * Close a modal by ID.
   292→ * @param {string} modalId - ID of modal element
   293→ */
   294→function closeModal(modalId) {
   295→  const modal = document.getElementById(modalId);
   296→  if (modal) {
   297→    modal.classList.remove('visible');
   298→    modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
   299→    // Restore body scroll
   300→    if (!document.querySelector('[role="dialog"].visible')) {
   301→      document.body.style.overflow = '';
   302→    }
   303→  }
   304→}
   305→
   306→/**
   307→ * Close all open modals.
   308→ */
   309→function closeAllModals() {
   310→  document.querySelectorAll('[role="dialog"]').forEach(modal => {
   311→    modal.classList.remove('visible');
   312→    modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
   313→  });
   314→  document.body.style.overflow = '';
   315→}
   316→
   317→/**
   318→ * Show session conflict warning banner (multiple tabs active).
   319→ */
   320→function showSessionConflictBanner() {
   321→  const banner = document.getElementById('session-conflict-banner');
   322→  if (banner) {
   323→    banner.style.display = 'block';
   324→  }
   325→}
   326→
   327→/**
   328→ * Display an alert modal with title and message.
   329→ * @param {string} title - Modal title
   330→ * @param {string} message - Modal message
   331→ */
   332→function showAlertModal(title, message) {
   333→  const modal = document.getElementById('alert-modal');
   334→  if (!modal) {
   335→    // Create alert modal if it doesn't exist
   336→    const newModal = document.createElement('div');
   337→    newModal.id = 'alert-modal';
   338→    newModal.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
   339→    newModal.innerHTML = `
   340→      <div class="modal-overlay alert-modal-overlay" style="display: none;">
   341→        <div class="modal-content alert-modal">
   342→          <h2 id="alert-title"></h2>
   343→          <p id="alert-message"></p>
   344→          <button onclick="closeAlertModal()" class="modal-btn">OK</button>
   345→        </div>
   346→      </div>
   347→    `;
   348→    document.body.appendChild(newModal);
   349→  }
   350→
   351→  document.getElementById('alert-title').textContent = title;
   352→  document.getElementById('alert-message').innerHTML = message;
   353→  openModal('alert-modal');
   354→}
   355→
   356→/**
   357→ * Close the alert modal.
   358→ */
   359→function closeAlertModal() {
   360→  closeModal('alert-modal');
   361→}
   362→
   363→/**
   364→ * Route message responses to appropriate handlers based on workflow phase.
   365→ * @param {string} phase - Current workflow phase
   366→ * @param {object} response - Server response
   367→ */
   368→async function displayMessage(phase, response) {
   369→  try {
   370→    switch (phase) {
   371→      case 'job_input':
   372→        if (response.error) {
   373→          appendMessage('system', `Error: ${response.error}`);
   374→        } else if (response.job_analysis) {
   375→          // Analysis ready
   376→          tabData.analysis = response.job_analysis;
   377→          appendMessage('assistant', `Analysis complete! I'll now show you the job analysis and post-analysis questions.`);
   378→          switchTab('analysis');
   379→          if (typeof populateAnalysisTab === 'function') {
   380→            populateAnalysisTab(response.job_analysis);
   381→          }
   382→          if (typeof askPostAnalysisQuestions === 'function') {
   383→            await askPostAnalysisQuestions(response.job_analysis);
   384→          }
   385→        }
   386→        break;
   387→
   388→      case 'customization_selection':
   389→        if (response.customizations) {
   390→          tabData.customizations = response.customizations;
   391→          window.pendingRecommendations = response.customizations;
   392→          switchTab('customizations');
   393→          if (typeof populateCustomizationsTab === 'function') {
   394→            populateCustomizationsTab(response.customizations);
   395→          }
   396→        }
   397→        break;
   398→
   399→      case 'rewrite_review':
   400→        if (response.rewrites) {
   401→          switchTab('rewrites');
   402→          if (typeof fetchAndReviewRewrites === 'function') {
   403→            await fetchAndReviewRewrites();
   404→          }
   405→        }
   406→        break;
   407→
   408→      case 'generation':
   409→        if (response.generated_files) {
   410→          tabData.cv = response.generated_files;
   411→          switchTab('download');
   412→          if (typeof populateDownloadTab === 'function') {
   413→            await populateDownloadTab(response.generated_files);
   414→          }
   415→        }
   416→        break;
   417→
   418→      default:
   419→        // Regular conversation message
   420→        if (response.message || response.response) {
   421→          appendMessage('assistant', response.message || response.response);
   422→        }
   423→    }
   424→  } catch (error) {
   425→    console.error('Error displaying message:', error);
   426→    appendMessage('system', `Error processing response: ${error.message}`);
   427→  }
   428→}
   429→
   430→/**
   431→ * Update visual workflow indicator (progress bar, breadcrumb).
   432→ * @param {object} status - Status object from server
   433→ */
   434→function updatePhaseIndicator(status) {
   435→  if (!status.phase) return;
   436→
   437→  const sessionNameEl = document.getElementById('header-session-name');
   438→  if (sessionNameEl) {
   439→    sessionNameEl.textContent = status.position_name || '';
   440→  }
   441→
   442→  const phases = ['job_input', 'analysis', 'customization', 'rewrite_review', 'generation', 'refinement'];
   443→  const phaseIndex = phases.indexOf(status.phase);
   444→
   445→  document.querySelectorAll('.step').forEach((step, idx) => {
   446→    step.classList.remove('active', 'completed', 'upcoming');
   447→
   448→    if (idx < phaseIndex) {
   449→      step.classList.add('completed');
   450→    } else if (idx === phaseIndex) {
   451→      step.classList.add('active');
   452→    } else {
   453→      step.classList.add('upcoming');
   454→    }
   455→  });
   456→}
   457→
   458→/**
   459→ * Handle click on a workflow step indicator.
   460→ * Job step always opens the load-job panel; other steps navigate to their tab if completed/active.
   461→ * @param {string} step - Step name matching step-{name} element IDs
   462→ */
   463→function handleStepClick(step) {
   464→  const el = document.getElementById(`step-${step}`);
   465→  if (!el) return;
   466→
   467→  if (step === 'job') { showLoadJobPanel(); return; }
   468→
   469→  if (!el.classList.contains('completed') && !el.classList.contains('active')) return;
   470→
   471→  const stepToTab = {
   472→    analysis:       'analysis',
   473→    customizations: 'customizations',
   474→    rewrite:        'rewrite',
   475→    spell:          'spell',
   476→    generate:       'cv',
   477→    finalise:       'download',
   478→  };
   479→  const tabName = stepToTab[step];
   480→  if (tabName) switchTab(tabName);
   481→}
   482→
   483→/**
   484→ * Enable/disable controls based on workflow state.
   485→ * @param {boolean} enabled - True to enable controls
   486→ */
   487→function setControlsEnabled(enabled) {
   488→  document.querySelectorAll('button, input, textarea').forEach(el => {
   489→    el.disabled = !enabled;
   490→  });
   491→}
   492→
   493→// ── Model selector ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   494→
   495→let _modelData = null; // cached from last loadModelSelector() call
   496→let _modelDataTable = null;
   497→let _selectedModelProviders = new Set();
   498→
   499→async function loadModelSelector() {
   500→  try {
   501→    _modelData = await apiCall('GET', '/api/model');
   502→    const label = document.getElementById('model-current-label');
   503→    if (label) {
   504→      const prov  = _modelData.provider;
   505→      const model = _modelData.model || '—';
   506→      label.textContent = prov ? `${prov} · ${model}` : model;
   507→    }
   508→    if (_modelData && _modelData.provider) {
   509→      _selectedModelProviders = new Set([_modelData.provider]);
   510→    }
   511→  } catch (e) {
   512→    console.warn('Could not load model list:', e);
   513→  }
   514→}
   515→
   516→function _providerStageLabel(provider, capableSet) {
   517→  const isCapable = capableSet.has(provider);
   518→  return isCapable ? 'list_models' : 'fallback';
   519→}
   520→
   521→function _renderProviderSelector() {
   522→  const listEl = document.getElementById('model-provider-list');
   523→  if (!listEl || !_modelData) return;
   524→
   525→  const providers = Array.isArray(_modelData.providers)
   526→    ? _modelData.providers
   527→    : Array.from(new Set((_modelData.all_models || []).map(r => r.provider).filter(Boolean))).sort();
   528→  const capableSet = new Set(_modelData.list_models_capable || []);
   529→
   530→  if (_selectedModelProviders.size === 0 && _modelData.provider) {
   531→    _selectedModelProviders.add(_modelData.provider);
   532→  }
   533→
   534→  listEl.innerHTML = '';
   535→  providers.forEach(provider => {
   536→    const checked = _selectedModelProviders.has(provider);
   537→    const sourceLabel = _providerStageLabel(provider, capableSet);
   538→
   539→    const label = document.createElement('label');
   540→    label.style.cssText = 'display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 8px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:999px; font-size:0.82em; background:#fff; cursor:pointer;';
   541→    label.innerHTML =
   542→      `<input type="checkbox" value="${escapeHtml(provider)}" ${checked ? 'checked' : ''} style="margin:0;" />` +
   543→      `<span>${escapeHtml(provider)}</span>` +
   544→      `<span style="color:#64748b; font-size:0.8em;">(${escapeHtml(sourceLabel)})</span>`;
   545→
   546→    const checkbox = label.querySelector('input');
   547→    checkbox.addEventListener('change', async (event) => {
   548→      if (event.target.checked) {
   549→        _selectedModelProviders.add(provider);
   550→      } else {
   551→        _selectedModelProviders.delete(provider);
   552→      }
   553→      if (_selectedModelProviders.size === 0 && _modelData.provider) {
   554→        _selectedModelProviders.add(_modelData.provider);
   555→        event.target.checked = true;
   556→      }
   557→      await _refreshModelCatalogForSelection();
   558→    });
   559→
   560→    listEl.appendChild(label);
   561→  });
   562→}
   563→
   564→async function _refreshModelCatalogForSelection() {
   565→  if (!_modelData) return;
   566→
   567→  const selected = Array.from(_selectedModelProviders);
   568→  if (!selected.length) {
   569→    _selectedModelProviders = new Set([_modelData.provider]);
   570→  }
   571→
   572→  try {
   573→    const providersParam = encodeURIComponent(Array.from(_selectedModelProviders).join(','));
   574→    const catalog = await apiCall('GET', `/api/model-catalog?providers=${providersParam}`);
   575→    _modelData.all_models = catalog.all_models || [];
   576→    _modelData.pricing_updated_at = catalog.pricing_updated_at || _modelData.pricing_updated_at;
   577→    _modelData.pricing_source = catalog.pricing_source || _modelData.pricing_source;
   578→    if (Array.isArray(catalog.providers) && catalog.providers.length) {
   579→      _modelData.providers = catalog.providers;
   580→    }
   581→    if (Array.isArray(catalog.list_models_capable)) {
   582→      _modelData.list_models_capable = catalog.list_models_capable;
   583→    }
   584→  } catch (error) {
   585→    console.warn('Could not refresh model catalog for selected providers:', error);
   586→  }
   587→
   588→  _buildModelTable();
   589→}
   590→
   591→async function openModelModal() {
   592→  const overlay = document.getElementById('model-modal-overlay');
   593→  if (!overlay) return;
   594→
   595→  if (!_modelData) {
   596→    await loadModelSelector();
   597→  }
   598→  _renderProviderSelector();
   599→  await _refreshModelCatalogForSelection();
   600→  overlay.style.display = 'flex';
   601→}
   602→
   603→function closeModelModal() {
   604→  const overlay = document.getElementById('model-modal-overlay');
   605→  if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
   606→}
   607→
   608→function _applyModelRowVisualState(tr, isActive) {
   609→  tr.classList.toggle('model-row-active', isActive);
   610→  tr.style.cssText = isActive
   611→    ? 'background:#eff6ff; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;'
   612→    : 'cursor:pointer;';
   613→
   614→  const model = tr.getAttribute('data-model') || '';
   615→  const modelCell = tr.cells && tr.cells[1];
   616→  if (modelCell) {
   617→    modelCell.innerHTML = `${escapeHtml(model)}` +
   618→      (isActive ? ' <span style="color:#3b82f6; font-size:0.75em;">&#10003; active</span>' : '');
   619→  }
   620→}
   621→
   622→function _syncModelTableSelection() {
   623→  const tbody = document.getElementById('model-table-body');
   624→  if (!tbody || !_modelData) return;
   625→
   626→  const activeProvider = _modelData.provider;
   627→  const activeModel = _modelData.model;
   628→  tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
   629→    const isActive = (
   630→      tr.getAttribute('data-provider') === activeProvider &&
   631→      tr.getAttribute('data-model') === activeModel
   632→    );
   633→    _applyModelRowVisualState(tr, isActive);
   634→  });
   635→}
   636→
   637→function _buildModelTable() {
   638→  const tbody = document.getElementById('model-table-body');
   639→  const thead = document.getElementById('model-table-head');
   640→  if (!tbody || !_modelData) return;
   641→
   642→  const currentProvider = _modelData.provider;
   643→  const currentModel    = _modelData.model;
   644→
   645→  // Fixed 7-column headers — no dynamic rebuilding needed
   646→  if (thead) {
   647→    const thS = 'padding:10px 14px; white-space:nowrap;';
   648→    thead.innerHTML =
   649→      `<tr style="background:#f1f5f9; text-align:left;">` +
   650→        `<th style="${thS}">Provider</th>` +
   651→        `<th style="${thS}">Model</th>` +
   652→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;">Context</th>` +
   653→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;" title="USD per 1M input tokens (direct API billing)">$/1M in</th>` +
   654→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;" title="USD per 1M output tokens (direct API billing)">$/1M out</th>` +
   655→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;" title="GitHub Copilot premium-request multiplier (0 = free for paid subscribers)">Copilot</th>` +
   656→        `<th style="${thS}">Source</th>` +
   657→        `<th style="${thS}">Notes</th>` +
   658→      `</tr>`;
   659→  }
   660→
   661→  // Tear down any existing DataTable before rebuilding rows.
   662→  if (window.$ && $.fn && $.fn.DataTable && $.fn.DataTable.isDataTable('#model-table')) {
   663→    _modelDataTable = $('#model-table').DataTable();
   664→    _modelDataTable.destroy();
   665→    _modelDataTable = null;
   666→  }
   667→
   668→  // Prefer cross-provider list; fall back to current-provider available list
   669→  let rows = (_modelData.all_models && _modelData.all_models.length)
   670→    ? _modelData.all_models.filter(r => r.model)
   671→    : (_modelData.available || []).map(r =>
   672→        typeof r === 'object'
   673→          ? { ...r, provider: currentProvider }
   674→          : { model: r, provider: currentProvider }
   675→      );
   676→
   677→  tbody.innerHTML = '';
   678→  const tdBase  = 'padding:9px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;';
   679→  const fmtCost = v => (v != null) ? '$' + Number(v).toFixed(v < 1 ? 3 : 2) : '—';
   680→  const fmtPriceHint = source => {
   681→    if (source === 'runtime_cache') {
   682→      return '<span title="Price from runtime cache" style="margin-left:6px; display:inline-block; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:999px; background:#ecfeff; color:#0f766e; font-size:0.72em; font-weight:600; vertical-align:middle;">cache</span>';
   683→    }
   684→    return '<span title="Price from static baseline" style="margin-left:6px; display:inline-block; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:999px; background:#f8fafc; color:#64748b; font-size:0.72em; font-weight:600; vertical-align:middle;">static</span>';
   685→  };
   686→  const fmtSource = s => {
   687→    if (s === 'list_models') {
   688→      return '<span style="display:inline-block; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:999px; background:#ecfeff; color:#0f766e; font-size:0.78em; font-weight:600;">list_models</span>';
   689→    }
   690→    return '<span style="display:inline-block; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:999px; background:#f1f5f9; color:#475569; font-size:0.78em; font-weight:600;">fallback_static</span>';
   691→  };
   692→  const fmtMult = v => {
   693→    if (v == null) return '—';
   694→    if (v === 0)   return '<span style="color:#16a34a; font-weight:600;">free</span>';
   695→    return Number(v).toFixed(v % 1 === 0 ? 0 : 2) + '&times;';
   696→  };
   697→
   698→  rows.forEach(item => {
   699→    const provider   = item.provider || currentProvider;
   700→    const m          = item.model;
   701→    const ctx        = item.context_window ? Number(item.context_window).toLocaleString() : '—';
   702→    const source     = item.source || 'fallback_static';
   703→    const priceSource = item.price_source || 'static_baseline';
   704→    const notes      = item.notes || '';
   705→    const isSelected = (provider === currentProvider && m === currentModel);
   706→
   707→    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
   708→    tr.setAttribute('data-provider', provider);
   709→    tr.setAttribute('data-model', m);
   710→    _applyModelRowVisualState(tr, isSelected);
   711→    tr.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
   712→      if (!tr.classList.contains('model-row-active')) tr.style.background = '#f8fafc';
   713→    });
   714→    tr.addEventListener('mouseout', () => {
   715→      if (!tr.classList.contains('model-row-active')) tr.style.background = '';
   716→    });
   717→
   718→    tr.innerHTML =
   719→      `<td style="${tdBase} color:#64748b; white-space:nowrap;">${escapeHtml(provider)}</td>` +
   720→      `<td style="${tdBase}">${escapeHtml(m)}</td>` +
   721→      `<td style="${tdBase} white-space:nowrap; text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;">${ctx}</td>` +
   722→      `<td style="${tdBase} text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap;">${fmtCost(item.cost_input)}${fmtPriceHint(priceSource)}</td>` +
   723→      `<td style="${tdBase} text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap;">${fmtCost(item.cost_output)}${fmtPriceHint(priceSource)}</td>` +
   724→      `<td style="${tdBase} text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap;">${fmtMult(item.copilot_multiplier)}</td>` +
   725→      `<td style="${tdBase} white-space:nowrap;">${fmtSource(source)}</td>` +
   726→      `<td style="${tdBase} color:#64748b;">${notes}</td>`;
   727→    tbody.appendChild(tr);
   728→  });
   729→
   730→  // Rebind row click using delegation so sorting/filter redraws still work.
   731→  tbody.onclick = (event) => {
   732→    const tr = event.target.closest('tr');
   733→    if (!tr) return;
   734→    const provider = tr.getAttribute('data-provider');
   735→    const model = tr.getAttribute('data-model');
   736→    if (!model) return;
   737→    setModel(model, provider);
   738→  };
   739→
   740→  // Enhance with DataTables for sorting/searching; keep paging disabled.
   741→  if (window.$ && $.fn && $.fn.DataTable) {
   742→    _modelDataTable = $('#model-table').DataTable({
   743→      paging: false,
   744→      searching: true,
   745→      info: false,
   746→      orderCellsTop: true,
   747→      order: [[0, 'asc'], [1, 'asc']],
   748→      autoWidth: false,
   749→      language: { search: 'Filter:' },
   750→      initComplete: function() {
   751→        const api = this.api();
   752→        const $thead = $('#model-table thead');
   753→        const hasFilterRow = $thead.find('tr.model-filter-row').length > 0;
   754→        if (!hasFilterRow) {
   755→          const $filterRow = $('<tr class="model-filter-row"></tr>');
   756→          api.columns().every(function(colIdx) {
   757→            const title = $(api.column(colIdx).header()).text().trim();
   758→            const $th = $('<th style="padding:6px 10px; background:#f8fafc; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;"></th>');
   759→            const $input = $(`<input type="text" placeholder="${title}" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:4px; font-size:0.82em;" />`);
   760→            $th.append($input);
   761→            $filterRow.append($th);
   762→          });
   763→          $thead.append($filterRow);
   764→        }
   765→
   766→        api.columns().every(function(colIdx) {
   767→          const $input = $('#model-table thead tr.model-filter-row th').eq(colIdx).find('input');
   768→          if (!$input.length) return;
   769→          $input.off('click.modelFilter keyup.modelFilter change.modelFilter');
   770→          $input.on('click.modelFilter', function(event) { event.stopPropagation(); });
   771→          $input.on('keyup.modelFilter change.modelFilter', function() {
   772→            const value = this.value;
   773→            if (api.column(colIdx).search() !== value) {
   774→              api.column(colIdx).search(value).draw();
   775→            }
   776→          });
   777→        });
   778→      },
   779→    });
   780→  }
   781→
   782→  _syncModelTableSelection();
   783→
   784→  // Update pricing freshness footer
   785→  _updatePricingFooter();
   786→}
   787→
   788→async function setModel(model, provider) {
   789→  if (!model) return;
   790→  try {
   791→    const payload = provider ? { model, provider } : { model };
   792→    await apiCall('POST', '/api/model', payload);
   793→    if (_modelData) {
   794→      _modelData.model    = model;
   795→      if (provider) _modelData.provider = provider;
   796→    }
   797→    const label = document.getElementById('model-current-label');
   798→    if (label) {
   799→      const prov = (_modelData && _modelData.provider) || provider;
   800→      label.textContent  = prov ? `${prov} · ${model}` : model;
   801→    }
   802→    _syncModelTableSelection();
   803→    // Keep the modal open so the user can click "Test connection"
   804→    // Fire-and-forget connection test so the result appears immediately
   805→    testCurrentModel();
   806→  } catch (e) {
   807→    console.error('Failed to switch model:', e);
   808→    const msg = e.message || String(e);
   809→    const status = document.getElementById('model-test-status');
   810→    if (status) {
   811→      status.style.display = '';
   812→      status.style.color = '#dc2626';
   813→      status.textContent = `❌ ${msg}`;
   814→    }
   815→    if (typeof appendMessage === 'function') {
   816→      appendMessage('system', `❌ Model switch failed: ${msg}`);
   817→    }
   818→  }
   819→}
   820→
   821→async function testCurrentModel() {
   822→  // Update both the header badge and the modal status line
   823→  const badge  = document.getElementById('model-test-badge');
   824→  const status = document.getElementById('model-test-status');
   825→  const btn    = document.getElementById('model-test-btn');
   826→
   827→  const SPIN = '⏳';
   828→  const OK   = '✅';
   829→  const FAIL = '❌';
   830→
   831→  const setRunning = () => {
   832→    if (badge)  { badge.textContent  = SPIN; badge.style.display  = ''; badge.title  = 'Testing…'; }
   833→    if (status) { status.innerHTML   = `${SPIN} Testing connection…`; status.style.display = ''; }
   834→    if (btn)    { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '⏳ Testing…'; }
   835→  };
   836→
   837→  const setOk = (latencyMs) => {
   838→    const tip = `Connected — ${latencyMs}ms`;
   839→    if (badge)  { badge.textContent  = OK;  badge.style.display  = ''; badge.title  = tip; }
   840→    if (status) { status.innerHTML   = `${OK} ${tip}`; status.style.color = '#16a34a'; status.style.display = ''; }
   841→    if (btn)    { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#10003; Test connection'; }
   842→    // Auto-clear the badge after 30 s so it doesn't linger forever
   843→    setTimeout(() => {
   844→      if (badge  && badge.textContent  === OK)  badge.style.display  = 'none';
   845→      if (status && status.textContent.includes(tip)) status.style.display = 'none';
   846→    }, 30_000);
   847→  };
   848→
   849→  const setFail = (errMsg) => {
   850→    if (badge)  { badge.textContent  = FAIL; badge.style.display  = ''; badge.title  = errMsg; }
   851→    if (status) {
   852→      status.innerHTML   = `${FAIL} <span title="${errMsg.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}" style="cursor:help; text-decoration:underline dotted;">Connection failed</span>`;
   853→      status.style.color = '#dc2626';
   854→      status.style.display = '';
   855→    }
   856→    if (btn)    { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#10003; Test connection'; }
   857→  };
   858→
   859→  setRunning();
   860→  try {
   861→    const result = await apiCall('POST', '/api/model/test');
   862→    if (result.ok) {
   863→      setOk(result.latency_ms);
   864→    } else {
   865→      setFail(result.error || 'Unknown error');
   866→    }
   867→  } catch (e) {
   868→    setFail(e.message || String(e));
   869→  }
   870→}
   871→
   872→function _updatePricingFooter() {
   873→  const el = document.getElementById('pricing-updated-label');
   874→  if (!el || !_modelData) return;
   875→  const ts     = _modelData.pricing_updated_at;
   876→  const source = _modelData.pricing_source;
   877→
   878→  const sourceLabel = (source === 'openrouter')
   879→    ? '<a href="https://openrouter.ai" target="_blank" rel="noopener" ' +
   880→      'style="color:inherit; text-decoration:underline dotted;">OpenRouter</a>'
   881→    : 'static baseline (March 2026)';
   882→
   883→  if (!ts) { el.innerHTML = `Prices: ${sourceLabel}`; return; }
   884→  try {
   885→    const d   = new Date(ts);
   886→    const now = new Date();
   887→    const h   = Math.round((now - d) / 3_600_000);
   888→    const age = h < 1 ? 'just now' : h < 24 ? `${h}h ago` : `${Math.round(h / 24)}d ago`;
   889→    el.innerHTML = `Prices via ${sourceLabel} &middot; updated ${age}`;
   890→  } catch { el.innerHTML = `Prices: ${sourceLabel}`; }
   891→}
   892→
   893→async function refreshModelPricing() {
   894→  const btn = document.getElementById('pricing-refresh-btn');
   895→  const lbl = document.getElementById('pricing-updated-label');
   896→  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Refreshing…'; }
   897→  try {
   898→    await apiCall('POST', '/api/model-pricing/refresh');
   899→    // Re-fetch model data so the table gets fresh prices
   900→    _modelData = await apiCall('GET', '/api/model');
   901→    _buildModelTable();
   902→  } catch (e) {
   903→    if (lbl) lbl.textContent = 'Refresh failed';
   904→    console.error('Pricing refresh failed:', e);
   905→  } finally {
   906→    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '↻ Refresh prices'; }
   907→  }
   908→}
   909→
   910→// Initialize on page load — delegates to app.js init() which is loaded after this file
   911→document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
   912→  loadModelSelector();
   913→  if (typeof init === 'function') init();
   914→});
   915→
```

    15→async function restoreSession() {
    16→  try {
    17→    isReconnecting = true;
    18→    
    19→    // Try to get session ID from localStorage
    20→    const storedSessionId = localStorage.getItem('cv-builder-session-id');
    21→    if (storedSessionId) {
    22→      sessionId = storedSessionId;
    23→    } else {
    24→      // Generate new session ID
    25→      sessionId = 'session-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
    26→      localStorage.setItem('cv-builder-session-id', sessionId);
    27→    }
    28→    
    29→    // Try to restore conversation history
    30→    const historyRes = await fetch('/api/history');
    31→    if (historyRes.ok) {
    32→      const historyData = await historyRes.json();
    33→      
    34→      // Restore conversation messages
    35→      if (historyData.history && historyData.history.length > 0) {
    36→        const conversation = document.getElementById('conversation');
    37→        conversation.innerHTML = ''; // Clear loading message
    38→        
    39→        historyData.history.forEach(msg => {
    40→          if (msg.role === 'user') {
    41→            appendMessage('user', msg.content);
    42→          } else if (msg.role === 'assistant') {
    43→            appendMessage('assistant', msg.content);
    44→          } else if (msg.role === 'system') {
    45→            appendMessage('system', msg.content);
    46→          }
    47→        });
    48→        
    49→        appendMessage('system', '🔄 Session restored. You can continue where you left off.');
    50→      }
    51→      
    52→      // Update phase
    53→      if (historyData.phase) {
    54→        lastKnownPhase = historyData.phase;
    55→      }
    56→    }
    57→    
    58→    // Try to restore backend state
    59→    await restoreBackendState();
    60→    
    61→    // Restore tab data from localStorage
    62→    restoreTabData();
    63→    
    64→    isReconnecting = false;
    65→    
    66→  } catch (error) {

function handleStepClick(step) {
  const el = document.getElementById(`step-${step}`);
  if (!el) return;

  if (step === 'job') { showLoadJobPanel(); return; }

  if (!el.classList.contains('completed') && !el.classList.contains('active')) return;

  const stepToTab = {
    analysis:       'analysis',
    customizations: 'customizations',
    rewrite:        'rewrite',
    spell:          'spell',
    generate:       'cv',
    finalise:       'download',
  };
  const tabName = stepToTab[step];
  if (tabName) switchTab(tabName);
}
```

**Behavior:**
- `job` step opens the job upload panel (special case)
- Only allows navigation to completed or active steps
- Maps step names to tab names (note: `generate` → `cv`, `finalise` → `download`)
- Calls `switchTab(tabName)` to navigate

#### **Tab Clicks** (Lines 118–124 in `ui-core.js`)
```javascript
document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(tab => {
  tab.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const tabName = e.target.id.replace('tab-', '');
    switchTab(tabName);
  });
});
```

**Behavior:**
- Extracts tab name from element ID (e.g., `tab-analysis` → `analysis`)
- Calls `switchTab(tabName)`

---

### 5. STATE TRACKING & PHASE MANAGEMENT

#### **Tab State** (Lines 166–194 in `ui-core.js`)
```javascript
function switchTab(tab) {
  // Update active tab button
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  const tabBtn = document.getElementById(`tab-${tab}`);
  if (tabBtn) {
    tabBtn.classList.add('active');
  }

  // Update current tab state via stateManager
  try {
    if (typeof stateManager !== 'undefined' && stateManager.setCurrentTab) {
      stateManager.setCurrentTab(tab);
    } else {
      // Fallback: direct localStorage if stateManager not available
      localStorage.setItem(StorageKeys.CURRENT_TAB, tab);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.warn('Could not save current tab to localStorage');
  }

  // Load content for the tab
  loadTabContent(tab);
}
```

**State Persistence:**
- Uses `stateManager.setCurrentTab(tab)` (from `state-manager.js`)
- Falls back to `localStorage.setItem(StorageKeys.CURRENT_TAB, tab)`
- On initialization (line 104), restores from localStorage

#### **Workflow Phase Updates** (Lines 434–456 in `ui-core.js`)
```javascript
function updatePhaseIndicator(status) {
  if (!status.phase) return;

  const phases = ['job_input', 'analysis', 'customization', 'rewrite_review', 'generation', 'refinement'];
  const phaseIndex = phases.indexOf(status.phase);

  document.querySelectorAll('.step').forEach((step, idx) => {
    step.classList.remove('active', 'completed', 'upcoming');

    if (idx < phaseIndex) {
      step.classList.add('completed');
    } else if (idx === phaseIndex) {
      step.classList.add('active');
    } else {
      step.classList.add('upcoming');
    }
  });
}
```

**Backend Phases:** `job_input` → `analysis` → `customization` → `rewrite_review` → `generation` → `refinement`

**Visual Updates:**
- Steps before current = `completed` (green)
- Current step = `active` (blue, may have pulsing animation)
- Steps after = `upcoming` (muted)

---

### 6. TAB-TO-STAGE MAPPING

| Tab ID | Tab Label | Stage | Step Mapping | Notes |
|--------|-----------|-------|--------------|-------|
| `job` | 📋 Job | Job Input | `job` | Special: opens panel instead of tab |
| `analysis` | 🔍 Analysis | Analysis | `analysis` | Post-job-upload |
| `questions` | 💬 Questions | Analysis | (none) | Post-analysis, user-response capture |
| `customizations` | ⚙️ Recommendations | Customization | `customizations` | LLM recommendations for content |
| `rewrite` | ✏️ Rewrites | Rewrite Review | `rewrite` | Accept/reject proposed rewrites |
| `spell` | 🔤 Spell Check | Spell Check | `spell` | Grammar/spell review |
| `editor` | 📝 CV Editor | Customization | (none) | Manual editing (Phase 5 or later) |
| `cv` | 📄 Generated CV | Generation | `generate` (→ `cv`) | Final CV preview |
| `layout` | 🎨 Layout | Refinement | `layout` | Natural-language layout instructions (Phase 12) |
| `download` | ⬇️ Download | Refinement | `finalise` (→ `download`) | Final download & archive |
| `master` | 📚 Master CV | (utility) | (none) | View/manage master data (Phase 13) |
| `cover-letter` | 📩 Cover Letter | (utility) | (none) | Generate cover letter (Phase 14) |
| `screening` | 📋 Screening | (utility) | (none) | Screening questions/responses (Phase 15) |

**Note:** Utility tabs (master, cover-letter, screening) don't map to workflow steps — they're always accessible.

---

### 7. TAB CONTENT LOADING

**Lines 201–254 in `ui-core.js`:**
```javascript
async function loadTabContent(tab) {
  const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
  if (!content) return;

  content.innerHTML = '';

  try {
    switch (tab) {
      case 'job':
        if (typeof populateJobTab === 'function') {
          await populateJobTab();
        }
        break;

      case 'analysis':
        if (typeof populateAnalysisTab === 'function' && tabData.analysis) {
          populateAnalysisTab(tabData.analysis);
        }
        break;
      // ... more cases
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error loading tab ${tab}:`, error);
  }
}
```

**Pattern:**
- Clears previous content
- Routes to appropriate population function based on tab name
- Falls back to "No data yet" messages if data unavailable

---

### Summary

**Workflow Progress Bar (Top):** 8 stages with visual indicators (completed=green, active=blue, upcoming=muted). Clicking navigates only if stage is completed/active.

**Tab Navigation Bar (Second):** 14 tabs including utility tabs. Clicking switches tab and persists state to localStorage. Tab content is lazy-loaded from cache or populated via API.

**State Tracking:** 
- Tab state: localStorage + stateManager
- Workflow phase: server-driven, updates visual indicators via `updatePhaseIndicator()`
- Content cache: in-memory `tabData` object

All files are at `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/web/`.

   372→        if (response.error) {
   373→          appendMessage('system', `Error: ${response.error}`);
   374→        } else if (response.job_analysis) {
   375→          // Analysis ready
   376→          tabData.analysis = response.job_analysis;
   377→          appendMessage('assistant', `Analysis complete! I'll now show you the job analysis and post-analysis questions.`);
   378→          switchTab('analysis');
   379→          if (typeof populateAnalysisTab === 'function') {
   380→            populateAnalysisTab(response.job_analysis);
   381→          }
   382→          if (typeof askPostAnalysisQuestions === 'function') {
   383→            await askPostAnalysisQuestions(response.job_analysis);
   384→          }
   385→        }
   386→        break;
   387→
   388→      case 'customization_selection':
   389→        if (response.customizations) {
   390→          tabData.customizations = response.customizations;
   391→          window.pendingRecommendations = response.customizations;
   392→          switchTab('customizations');
   393→          if (typeof populateCustomizationsTab === 'function') {
   394→            populateCustomizationsTab(response.customizations);
   395→          }
   396→        }
   397→        break;
   398→
   399→      case 'rewrite_review':
   400→        if (response.rewrites) {
   401→          switchTab('rewrites');
   402→          if (typeof fetchAndReviewRewrites === 'function') {
   403→            await fetchAndReviewRewrites();
   404→          }
   405→        }
   406→        break;
   407→
   408→      case 'generation':
   409→        if (response.generated_files) {
   410→          tabData.cv = response.generated_files;
   411→          switchTab('download');
   412→          if (typeof populateDownloadTab === 'function') {
   413→            await populateDownloadTab(response.generated_files);
   414→          }
   415→        }
   416→        break;
   417→
   418→      default:
   419→        // Regular conversation message
   420→        if (response.message || response.response) {
   421→          appendMessage('assistant', response.message || response.response);
   422→        }
   423→    }
   424→  } catch (error) {
   425→    console.error('Error displaying message:', error);
   426→    appendMessage('system', `Error processing response: ${error.message}`);
   427→  }
   428→}
   429→
   430→/**
   431→ * Update visual workflow indicator (progress bar, breadcrumb).
   432→ * @param {object} status - Status object from server
   433→ */
   434→function updatePhaseIndicator(status) {
   435→  if (!status.phase) return;
   436→
   437→  const sessionNameEl = document.getElementById('header-session-name');
   438→  if (sessionNameEl) {
   439→    sessionNameEl.textContent = status.position_name || '';
   440→  }
   441→
   442→  const phases = ['job_input', 'analysis', 'customization', 'rewrite_review', 'generation', 'refinement'];
   443→  const phaseIndex = phases.indexOf(status.phase);
   444→
   445→  document.querySelectorAll('.step').forEach((step, idx) => {
   446→    step.classList.remove('active', 'completed', 'upcoming');
   447→
   448→    if (idx < phaseIndex) {
   449→      step.classList.add('completed');
   450→    } else if (idx === phaseIndex) {
   451→      step.classList.add('active');
   452→    } else {
   453→      step.classList.add('upcoming');
   454→    }
   455→  });
   456→}
   457→
   458→/**
   459→ * Handle click on a workflow step indicator.
   460→ * Job step always opens the load-job panel; other steps navigate to their tab if completed/active.
   461→ * @param {string} step - Step name matching step-{name} element IDs
   462→ */
   463→function handleStepClick(step) {
   464→  const el = document.getElementById(`step-${step}`);
   465→  if (!el) return;
   466→
   467→  if (step === 'job') { showLoadJobPanel(); return; }
   468→
   469→  if (!el.classList.contains('completed') && !el.classList.contains('active')) return;
   470→
   471→  const stepToTab = {
   472→    analysis:       'analysis',
   473→    customizations: 'customizations',
   474→    rewrite:        'rewrite',
   475→    spell:          'spell',
   476→    generate:       'cv',
   477→    finalise:       'download',
   478→  };
   479→  const tabName = stepToTab[step];
   480→  if (tabName) switchTab(tabName);
   481→}
   482→
   483→/**
   484→ * Enable/disable controls based on workflow state.
   485→ * @param {boolean} enabled - True to enable controls
   486→ */
   487→function setControlsEnabled(enabled) {
   488→  document.querySelectorAll('button, input, textarea').forEach(el => {
   489→    el.disabled = !enabled;
   490→  });
   491→}
   492→
   493→// ── Model selector ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   494→
   495→let _modelData = null; // cached from last loadModelSelector() call
   496→let _modelDataTable = null;
   497→let _selectedModelProviders = new Set();
   498→
   499→async function loadModelSelector() {
   500→  try {
   501→    _modelData = await apiCall('GET', '/api/model');
   502→    const label = document.getElementById('model-current-label');
   503→    if (label) {
   504→      const prov  = _modelData.provider;
   505→      const model = _modelData.model || '—';
   506→      label.textContent = prov ? `${prov} · ${model}` : model;
   507→    }
   508→    if (_modelData && _modelData.provider) {
   509→      _selectedModelProviders = new Set([_modelData.provider]);
   510→    }
   511→  } catch (e) {
   512→    console.warn('Could not load model list:', e);
   513→  }
   514→}
   515→
   516→function _providerStageLabel(provider, capableSet) {
   517→  const isCapable = capableSet.has(provider);
   518→  return isCapable ? 'list_models' : 'fallback';
   519→}
   520→
   521→function _renderProviderSelector() {
   522→  const listEl = document.getElementById('model-provider-list');
   523→  if (!listEl || !_modelData) return;
   524→
   525→  const providers = Array.isArray(_modelData.providers)
   526→    ? _modelData.providers
   527→    : Array.from(new Set((_modelData.all_models || []).map(r => r.provider).filter(Boolean))).sort();
   528→  const capableSet = new Set(_modelData.list_models_capable || []);
   529→
   530→  if (_selectedModelProviders.size === 0 && _modelData.provider) {
   531→    _selectedModelProviders.add(_modelData.provider);
   532→  }
   533→
   534→  listEl.innerHTML = '';
   535→  providers.forEach(provider => {
   536→    const checked = _selectedModelProviders.has(provider);
   537→    const sourceLabel = _providerStageLabel(provider, capableSet);
   538→
   539→    const label = document.createElement('label');
   540→    label.style.cssText = 'display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 8px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:999px; font-size:0.82em; background:#fff; cursor:pointer;';
   541→    label.innerHTML =
   542→      `<input type="checkbox" value="${escapeHtml(provider)}" ${checked ? 'checked' : ''} style="margin:0;" />` +
   543→      `<span>${escapeHtml(provider)}</span>` +
   544→      `<span style="color:#64748b; font-size:0.8em;">(${escapeHtml(sourceLabel)})</span>`;
   545→
   546→    const checkbox = label.querySelector('input');
   547→    checkbox.addEventListener('change', async (event) => {
   548→      if (event.target.checked) {
   549→        _selectedModelProviders.add(provider);
   550→      } else {
   551→        _selectedModelProviders.delete(provider);
   552→      }
   553→      if (_selectedModelProviders.size === 0 && _modelData.provider) {
   554→        _selectedModelProviders.add(_modelData.provider);
   555→        event.target.checked = true;
   556→      }
   557→      await _refreshModelCatalogForSelection();
   558→    });
   559→
   560→    listEl.appendChild(label);
   561→  });
   562→}
   563→
   564→async function _refreshModelCatalogForSelection() {
   565→  if (!_modelData) return;
   566→
   567→  const selected = Array.from(_selectedModelProviders);
   568→  if (!selected.length) {
   569→    _selectedModelProviders = new Set([_modelData.provider]);
   570→  }
   571→
   572→  try {
   573→    const providersParam = encodeURIComponent(Array.from(_selectedModelProviders).join(','));
   574→    const catalog = await apiCall('GET', `/api/model-catalog?providers=${providersParam}`);
   575→    _modelData.all_models = catalog.all_models || [];
   576→    _modelData.pricing_updated_at = catalog.pricing_updated_at || _modelData.pricing_updated_at;
   577→    _modelData.pricing_source = catalog.pricing_source || _modelData.pricing_source;
   578→    if (Array.isArray(catalog.providers) && catalog.providers.length) {
   579→      _modelData.providers = catalog.providers;
   580→    }
   581→    if (Array.isArray(catalog.list_models_capable)) {
   582→      _modelData.list_models_capable = catalog.list_models_capable;
   583→    }
   584→  } catch (error) {
   585→    console.warn('Could not refresh model catalog for selected providers:', error);
   586→  }
   587→
   588→  _buildModelTable();
   589→}
   590→
   591→async function openModelModal() {
   592→  const overlay = document.getElementById('model-modal-overlay');
   593→  if (!overlay) return;
   594→
   595→  if (!_modelData) {
   596→    await loadModelSelector();
   597→  }
   598→  _renderProviderSelector();
   599→  await _refreshModelCatalogForSelection();
   600→  overlay.style.display = 'flex';
   601→}
   602→
   603→function closeModelModal() {
   604→  const overlay = document.getElementById('model-modal-overlay');
   605→  if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
   606→}
   607→
   608→function _applyModelRowVisualState(tr, isActive) {
   609→  tr.classList.toggle('model-row-active', isActive);
   610→  tr.style.cssText = isActive
   611→    ? 'background:#eff6ff; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;'
   612→    : 'cursor:pointer;';
   613→
   614→  const model = tr.getAttribute('data-model') || '';
   615→  const modelCell = tr.cells && tr.cells[1];
   616→  if (modelCell) {
   617→    modelCell.innerHTML = `${escapeHtml(model)}` +
   618→      (isActive ? ' <span style="color:#3b82f6; font-size:0.75em;">&#10003; active</span>' : '');
   619→  }
   620→}
   621→
   622→function _syncModelTableSelection() {
   623→  const tbody = document.getElementById('model-table-body');
   624→  if (!tbody || !_modelData) return;
   625→
   626→  const activeProvider = _modelData.provider;
   627→  const activeModel = _modelData.model;
   628→  tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
   629→    const isActive = (
   630→      tr.getAttribute('data-provider') === activeProvider &&
   631→      tr.getAttribute('data-model') === activeModel
   632→    );
   633→    _applyModelRowVisualState(tr, isActive);
   634→  });
   635→}
   636→
   637→function _buildModelTable() {
   638→  const tbody = document.getElementById('model-table-body');
   639→  const thead = document.getElementById('model-table-head');
   640→  if (!tbody || !_modelData) return;
   641→
   642→  const currentProvider = _modelData.provider;
   643→  const currentModel    = _modelData.model;
   644→
   645→  // Fixed 7-column headers — no dynamic rebuilding needed
   646→  if (thead) {
   647→    const thS = 'padding:10px 14px; white-space:nowrap;';
   648→    thead.innerHTML =
   649→      `<tr style="background:#f1f5f9; text-align:left;">` +
   650→        `<th style="${thS}">Provider</th>` +
   651→        `<th style="${thS}">Model</th>` +
   652→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;">Context</th>` +
   653→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;" title="USD per 1M input tokens (direct API billing)">$/1M in</th>` +
   654→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;" title="USD per 1M output tokens (direct API billing)">$/1M out</th>` +
   655→        `<th style="${thS} text-align:right;" title="GitHub Copilot premium-request multiplier (0 = free for paid subscribers)">Copilot</th>` +
   656→        `<th style="${thS}">Source</th>` +
   657→        `<th style="${thS}">Notes</th>` +
   658→      `</tr>`;
   659→  }
   660→
   661→  // Tear down any existing DataTable before rebuilding rows.
   662→  if (window.$ && $.fn && $.fn.DataTable && $.fn.DataTable.isDataTable('#model-table')) {
   663→    _modelDataTable = $('#model-table').DataTable();
   664→    _modelDataTable.destroy();
   665→    _modelDataTable = null;
   666→  }
   667→
   668→  // Prefer cross-provider list; fall back to current-provider available list
   669→  let rows = (_modelData.all_models && _modelData.all_models.length)
   670→    ? _modelData.all_models.filter(r => r.model)
   671→    : (_modelData.available || []).map(r =>
   672→        typeof r === 'object'
   673→          ? { ...r, provider: currentProvider }
   674→          : { model: r, provider: currentProvider }
   675→      );
   676→
   677→  tbody.innerHTML = '';
   678→  const tdBase  = 'padding:9px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;';
   679→  const fmtCost = v => (v != null) ? '$' + Number(v).toFixed(v < 1 ? 3 : 2) : '—';
   680→  const fmtPriceHint = source => {
   681→    if (source === 'runtime_cache') {
   682→      return '<span title="Price from runtime cache" style="margin-left:6px; display:inline-block; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:999px; background:#ecfeff; color:#0f766e; font-size:0.72em; font-weight:600; vertical-align:middle;">cache</span>';
   683→    }
   684→    return '<span title="Price from static baseline" style="margin-left:6px; display:inline-block; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:999px; background:#f8fafc; color:#64748b; font-size:0.72em; font-weight:600; vertical-align:middle;">static</span>';
   685→  };
   686→  const fmtSource = s => {
   687→    if (s === 'list_models') {
   688→      return '<span style="display:inline-block; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:999px; background:#ecfeff; color:#0f766e; font-size:0.78em; font-weight:600;">list_models</span>';
   689→    }
   690→    return '<span style="display:inline-block; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:999px; background:#f1f5f9; color:#475569; font-size:0.78em; font-weight:600;">fallback_static</span>';
   691→  };
   692→  const fmtMult = v => {
   693→    if (v == null) return '—';
   694→    if (v === 0)   return '<span style="color:#16a34a; font-weight:600;">free</span>';
   695→    return Number(v).toFixed(v % 1 === 0 ? 0 : 2) + '&times;';
   696→  };
   697→
   698→  rows.forEach(item => {
   699→    const provider   = item.provider || currentProvider;
   700→    const m          = item.model;
   701→    const ctx        = item.context_window ? Number(item.context_window).toLocaleString() : '—';
   702→    const source     = item.source || 'fallback_static';
   703→    const priceSource = item.price_source || 'static_baseline';
   704→    const notes      = item.notes || '';
   705→    const isSelected = (provider === currentProvider && m === currentModel);
   706→
   707→    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
   708→    tr.setAttribute('data-provider', provider);
   709→    tr.setAttribute('data-model', m);
   710→    _applyModelRowVisualState(tr, isSelected);
   711→    tr.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
   712→      if (!tr.classList.contains('model-row-active')) tr.style.background = '#f8fafc';
   713→    });
   714→    tr.addEventListener('mouseout', () => {
   715→      if (!tr.classList.contains('model-row-active')) tr.style.background = '';
   716→    });
   717→
   718→    tr.innerHTML =
   719→      `<td style="${tdBase} color:#64748b; white-space:nowrap;">${escapeHtml(provider)}</td>` +
   720→      `<td style="${tdBase}">${escapeHtml(m)}</td>` +
   721→      `<td style="${tdBase} white-space:nowrap; text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;">${ctx}</td>` +
   722→      `<td style="${tdBase} text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap;">${fmtCost(item.cost_input)}${fmtPriceHint(priceSource)}</td>` +
   723→      `<td style="${tdBase} text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap;">${fmtCost(item.cost_output)}${fmtPriceHint(priceSource)}</td>` +
   724→      `<td style="${tdBase} text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap;">${fmtMult(item.copilot_multiplier)}</td>` +
   725→      `<td style="${tdBase} white-space:nowrap;">${fmtSource(source)}</td>` +
   726→      `<td style="${tdBase} color:#64748b;">${notes}</td>`;
   727→    tbody.appendChild(tr);
   728→  });
   729→
   730→  // Rebind row click using delegation so sorting/filter redraws still work.
   731→  tbody.onclick = (event) => {
   732→    const tr = event.target.closest('tr');
   733→    if (!tr) return;
   734→    const provider = tr.getAttribute('data-provider');
   735→    const model = tr.getAttribute('data-model');
   736→    if (!model) return;
   737→    setModel(model, provider);
   738→  };
   739→
   740→  // Enhance with DataTables for sorting/searching; keep paging disabled.
   741→  if (window.$ && $.fn && $.fn.DataTable) {
   742→    _modelDataTable = $('#model-table').DataTable({
   743→      paging: false,
   744→      searching: true,
   745→      info: false,
   746→      orderCellsTop: true,
   747→      order: [[0, 'asc'], [1, 'asc']],
   748→      autoWidth: false,
   749→      language: { search: 'Filter:' },
   750→      initComplete: function() {
   751→        const api = this.api();
   752→        const $thead = $('#model-table thead');
   753→        const hasFilterRow = $thead.find('tr.model-filter-row').length > 0;
   754→        if (!hasFilterRow) {
   755→          const $filterRow = $('<tr class="model-filter-row"></tr>');
   756→          api.columns().every(function(colIdx) {
   757→            const title = $(api.column(colIdx).header()).text().trim();
   758→            const $th = $('<th style="padding:6px 10px; background:#f8fafc; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;"></th>');
   759→            const $input = $(`<input type="text" placeholder="${title}" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:4px; font-size:0.82em;" />`);
   760→            $th.append($input);
   761→            $filterRow.append($th);
   762→          });
   763→          $thead.append($filterRow);
   764→        }
   765→
   766→        api.columns().every(function(colIdx) {
   767→          const $input = $('#model-table thead tr.model-filter-row th').eq(colIdx).find('input');
   768→          if (!$input.length) return;
   769→          $input.off('click.modelFilter keyup.modelFilter change.modelFilter');
   770→          $input.on('click.modelFilter', function(event) { event.stopPropagation(); });
   771→          $input.on('keyup.modelFilter change.modelFilter', function() {
   772→            const value = this.value;
   773→            if (api.column(colIdx).search() !== value) {
   774→              api.column(colIdx).search(value).draw();
   775→            }
   776→          });
   777→        });
   778→      },
   779→    });
   780→  }
   781→
   782→  _syncModelTableSelection();
   783→
   784→  // Update pricing freshness footer
   785→  _updatePricingFooter();
   786→}
   787→
   788→async function setModel(model, provider) {
   789→  if (!model) return;
   790→  try {
   791→    const payload = provider ? { model, provider } : { model };
   792→    await apiCall('POST', '/api/model', payload);
   793→    if (_modelData) {
   794→      _modelData.model    = model;
   795→      if (provider) _modelData.provider = provider;
   796→    }
   797→    const label = document.getElementById('model-current-label');
   798→    if (label) {
   799→      const prov = (_modelData && _modelData.provider) || provider;
   800→      label.textContent  = prov ? `${prov} · ${model}` : model;
   801→    }
   802→    _syncModelTableSelection();
   803→    // Keep the modal open so the user can click "Test connection"
   804→    // Fire-and-forget connection test so the result appears immediately
   805→    testCurrentModel();
   806→  } catch (e) {
   807→    console.error('Failed to switch model:', e);
   808→    const msg = e.message || String(e);
   809→    const status = document.getElementById('model-test-status');
   810→    if (status) {
   811→      status.style.display = '';
   812→      status.style.color = '#dc2626';
   813→      status.textContent = `❌ ${msg}`;
   814→    }
   815→    if (typeof appendMessage === 'function') {
   816→      appendMessage('system', `❌ Model switch failed: ${msg}`);
   817→    }
   818→  }
   819→}
   820→
   821→async function testCurrentModel() {
   822→  // Update both the header badge and the modal status line
   823→  const badge  = document.getElementById('model-test-badge');
   824→  const status = document.getElementById('model-test-status');
   825→  const btn    = document.getElementById('model-test-btn');
   826→
   827→  const SPIN = '⏳';
   828→  const OK   = '✅';
   829→  const FAIL = '❌';
   830→
   831→  const setRunning = () => {
   832→    if (badge)  { badge.textContent  = SPIN; badge.style.display  = ''; badge.title  = 'Testing…'; }
   833→    if (status) { status.innerHTML   = `${SPIN} Testing connection…`; status.style.display = ''; }
   834→    if (btn)    { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '⏳ Testing…'; }
   835→  };
   836→
   837→  const setOk = (latencyMs) => {
   838→    const tip = `Connected — ${latencyMs}ms`;
   839→    if (badge)  { badge.textContent  = OK;  badge.style.display  = ''; badge.title  = tip; }
   840→    if (status) { status.innerHTML   = `${OK} ${tip}`; status.style.color = '#16a34a'; status.style.display = ''; }
   841→    if (btn)    { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#10003; Test connection'; }
   842→    // Auto-clear the badge after 30 s so it doesn't linger forever
   843→    setTimeout(() => {
   844→      if (badge  && badge.textContent  === OK)  badge.style.display  = 'none';
   845→      if (status && status.textContent.includes(tip)) status.style.display = 'none';
   846→    }, 30_000);
   847→  };
   848→
   849→  const setFail = (errMsg) => {
   850→    if (badge)  { badge.textContent  = FAIL; badge.style.display  = ''; badge.title  = errMsg; }
   851→    if (status) {
   852→      status.innerHTML   = `${FAIL} <span title="${errMsg.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}" style="cursor:help; text-decoration:underline dotted;">Connection failed</span>`;
   853→      status.style.color = '#dc2626';
   854→      status.style.display = '';
   855→    }
   856→    if (btn)    { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#10003; Test connection'; }
   857→  };
   858→
   859→  setRunning();
   860→  try {
   861→    const result = await apiCall('POST', '/api/model/test');
   862→    if (result.ok) {
   863→      setOk(result.latency_ms);
   864→    } else {
   865→      setFail(result.error || 'Unknown error');
   866→    }
   867→  } catch (e) {
   868→    setFail(e.message || String(e));
   869→  }
   870→}
   871→
   872→function _updatePricingFooter() {
   873→  const el = document.getElementById('pricing-updated-label');
   874→  if (!el || !_modelData) return;
   875→  const ts     = _modelData.pricing_updated_at;
   876→  const source = _modelData.pricing_source;
   877→
   878→  const sourceLabel = (source === 'openrouter')
   879→    ? '<a href="https://openrouter.ai" target="_blank" rel="noopener" ' +
   880→      'style="color:inherit; text-decoration:underline dotted;">OpenRouter</a>'
   881→    : 'static baseline (March 2026)';

   883→  if (!ts) { el.innerHTML = `Prices: ${sourceLabel}`; return; }
   884→  try {

   889→    el.innerHTML = `Prices via ${sourceLabel} &middot; updated ${age}`;
   890→  } catch { el.innerHTML = `Prices: ${sourceLabel}`; }
   891→}

   893→async function refreshModelPricing() {
   894→  const btn = document.getElementById('pricing-refresh-btn');

   897→  try {
   898→    await apiCall('POST', '/api/model-pricing/refresh');
   899→    // Re-fetch model data so the table gets fresh prices
   900→    _modelData = await apiCall('GET', '/api/model');
   901→    _buildModelTable();
   902→  } catch (e) {
   903→    if (lbl) lbl.textContent = 'Refresh failed';
   904→    console.error('Pricing refresh failed:', e);
   905→  } finally {
   906→    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '↻ Refresh prices'; }
   907→  }
   908→}
   909→
   910→// Initialize on page load — delegates to app.js init() which is loaded after this file
   911→document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
   912→  loadModelSelector();
   913→  if (typeof init === 'function') init();
   914→});

   177→/**
   178→ * Return the stage that owns a given tab, or null if unmapped.
   179→ * @param {string} tab
   180→ * @returns {string|null}
   181→ */
   182→function getStageForTab(tab) {
   183→  for (const [stage, tabs] of Object.entries(STAGE_TABS)) {
   184→    if (tabs.includes(tab)) return stage;
   185→  }
   186→  return null;
   187→}
   188→
   189→/**
   190→ * Show only the tabs that belong to the given stage in the second nav bar.
   191→ * @param {string} stage - Key from STAGE_TABS
   192→ */
   193→function updateTabBarForStage(stage) {
   194→  const stageTabs = STAGE_TABS[stage] || [];
   195→  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(tab => {
   196→    tab.style.display = stageTabs.includes(tab.dataset.tab) ? '' : 'none';
   197→  });
   198→}
   199→
   200→/**
   201→ * Activate a workflow stage: update second-bar visibility and navigate to the
   202→ * first (or already-active) tab within that stage.
   203→ * @param {string} stage - Key from STAGE_TABS
   204→ */
   205→function switchStage(stage) {
   206→  currentStage = stage;
   207→  updateTabBarForStage(stage);
   208→  const stageTabs = STAGE_TABS[stage] || [];
   209→  if (stageTabs.length === 0) return;
   210→  // Prefer whichever tab within this stage is already active; else use first
   211→  const activeTab = document.querySelector('.tab.active');
   212→  const activeTabName = activeTab ? activeTab.dataset.tab : null;
   213→  const target = (activeTabName && stageTabs.includes(activeTabName))
   214→    ? activeTabName
   215→    : stageTabs[0];
   216→  switchTab(target);
   217→}
   218→
   219→/**
   220→ * Switch to a specific tab and load its content.
   221→ * @param {string} tab - Tab name (job, analysis, customizations, cv, download)
   222→ */
   223→function switchTab(tab) {
   224→  // Sync second-bar visibility to this tab's stage (without recursing into switchStage)
   225→  const tabStage = getStageForTab(tab);
   226→  if (tabStage && tabStage !== currentStage) {
   227→    currentStage = tabStage;
   228→    updateTabBarForStage(tabStage);
   229→  }
   230→
   231→  // Update active tab button
   232→  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
   233→  const tabBtn = document.getElementById(`tab-${tab}`);
   234→  if (tabBtn) {
   235→    tabBtn.classList.add('active');
   236→  }
   237→
   238→  // Update current tab state via stateManager
   239→  try {
   240→    if (typeof stateManager !== 'undefined' && stateManager.setCurrentTab) {
   241→      stateManager.setCurrentTab(tab);
   242→    } else {
   243→      // Fallback: direct localStorage if stateManager not available
   244→      localStorage.setItem(StorageKeys.CURRENT_TAB, tab);
   245→    }
   246→  } catch (e) {
   247→    console.warn('Could not save current tab to localStorage');
   248→  }
   249→
   250→  // Adjust layout for CV tab (paper-sized) vs. others (full-width)
   251→  const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
   252→  if (content) {
   253→    content.classList.toggle('full-width', tab !== 'cv');
   254→  }
   255→
   256→  // Load content for the tab
   257→  loadTabContent(tab);
   258→}
   259→
   260→/**
   261→ * Load content for a specific tab.
   262→ * Routes to appropriate rendering function based on tab.
   263→ * @param {string} tab - Tab name
   264→ */
   265→async function loadTabContent(tab) {
   266→  const content = document.getElementById('document-content');
   267→  if (!content) return;
   268→
   269→  content.innerHTML = ''; // Clear previous content

   278→

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-13 17:20:32Z)**_

The changes look correct. Here's a summary of what was done:

**[web/ui-core.js](web/ui-core.js)** — 3 additions, 1 simplification:

1. **`STAGE_TABS` constant** (line 10) — declares which tabs belong to each top-bar stage.

2. **`updateTabBarForStage(stage)`** — shows/hides tabs in the second bar by setting `display:none` on those not in the current stage.

3. **`switchStage(stage)`** — called when a top-bar step is clicked: updates `currentStage`, calls `updateTabBarForStage`, then navigates to the first (or already-active) tab within that stage.

4. **`switchTab(tab)`** — now also syncs `currentStage` + calls `updateTabBarForStage` when navigated programmatically (e.g., `displayMessage` calling `switchTab('analysis')` will automatically show the analysis-stage tabs).

5. **`handleStepClick(step)`** — simplified to just call `switchStage(step)` instead of the hardcoded `stepToTab` lookup.

On page load, the existing `switchTab(savedTab)` in `initialize()` will trigger `updateTabBarForStage` for whatever stage the saved tab belongs to, so the second bar is filtered correctly from the start.
